crus.action: A user should be able to download the mobile application through either an application store or similar service on the mobile phone.
crus.title: Download mobile application
crus.acceptance_criteria: In order for a user to download the mobile application.

crus.action: The application should be free to download.
crus.title: Download mobile application
crus.acceptance_criteria: In order for a user to download the mobile application.

crus.action: A user should be able to switch between a map view and a list view for all search options.
crus.title: Mobile application - Switch result view
crus.acceptance_criteria: In order for a user to switch between result views.

crus.action: A user should be able to select the information link, which is included on all result items.
crus.title: Mobile application - Selecting the information link
crus.acceptance_criteria: In order to show information about the restaurants.

crus.action: The link will direct the user to an information page, which includes a picture of the restaurant, the restaurant name, address, phone number, e-mail address, type of food, average price, restaurant description and a menu with name, description and price of the different dishes.
crus.title: Mobile application - Selecting the information link
crus.acceptance_criteria: In order to show information about the restaurants.

crus.action: A user should be able to input a maximum and a minimum price range.
crus.title: Mobile application - Search by price
crus.acceptance_criteria: In order for a user to search by price.

crus.action: A user should be able to input a maximum and a minimum distance, according to his/her position.
crus.title: Mobile application - Search by destination
crus.acceptance_criteria: In order for a user to search by destination.

crus.action: The user should be able to input a higher or lower maximum distance and a higher minimum distance than set by default.
crus.title: Mobile application - Search by destination
crus.acceptance_criteria: In order for a user to search by destination.

crus.action: Integers should be accepted as input when a user searches by price or destination.
crus.title: Accepted input for price and destination search
crus.acceptance_criteria: In order for a user to search with valid input.

crus.action: If the system receives an invalid input the user should be informed and prompted to insert an accepted input.
crus.title: Accepted input for price and destination search
crus.acceptance_criteria: In order for a user to search with valid input.

crus.action: A user should be able to select a restaurant type in a given list as input.
crus.title: Mobile application - Search by restaurant type
crus.acceptance_criteria: In order for a user to search by restaurant type.

crus.action: A user should be able to select a specific dish in a given list as input.
crus.title: Mobile application - Search by specific dish
crus.acceptance_criteria: In order for a user to search by specific dish.

crus.action: A user should be able to conduct a search by providing either restaurant name, restaurant description, restaurant address, restaurant type or restaurant menu in the free-text search field.
crus.title: Mobile application - Free-text search
crus.acceptance_criteria: In order for a user to search through the free-text search.

crus.action: If no match is found the user should be informed but kept on the search page in order to get the possibility to conduct a new search right away.
crus.title: Mobile application - No match found
crus.acceptance_criteria: In order for user to conduct a new search if no match is found.

crus.action: When viewing the results in a list, a user should be able to sort the results according to price, distance, restaurant type, specific dish or restaurant name.
crus.title: Mobile application - Sorting results
crus.acceptance_criteria: In order for a user to sort results in a list.

crus.action:  When sorting by restaurant name, specific dish or restaurant type the results should be ordered alphabetically.
crus.title: Mobile application - Sorting results
crus.acceptance_criteria: In order for a user to sort results in a list.

crus.action:  When sorting by price the results should be ordered from cheapest to most expensive.
crus.title: Mobile application - Sorting results
crus.acceptance_criteria: In order for a user to sort results in a list.

crus.action:  When sorting by distance the results should be ordered from closets to furthest distance according to the user’s position.
crus.title: Mobile application - Sorting results
crus.acceptance_criteria: In order for a user to sort results in a list.

crus.action: When a new/updated version or release of the software is released, the user should check for these manually.
crus.title: Download and notify users of new releases
crus.acceptance_criteria: In order for a user to download a new/updated release.

crus.action: The download of the new release should be done through the mobile phone in the same way as downloading the mobile application.
crus.title: Download and notify users of new releases
crus.acceptance_criteria: In order for a user to download a new/updated release.

crus.action: When viewing the results in a list or a map, a user should be able to filter the results in a filtering menu.
crus.title: Mobile application - Filtering results
crus.acceptance_criteria: In order for a user to filter results in a list or a map.

crus.action: On the mobile application, a user should have a profile page.
crus.title: Mobile application - Profile page
crus.acceptance_criteria: In order for a user to have a profile page on the mobile application.

crus.action: On the profile page a user can edit his/her information, which includes the password, e-mail address and phone number.
crus.title: Mobile application - Profile page
crus.acceptance_criteria: In order for a user to have a profile page on the mobile application.

crus.action: A user should also be able to choose what language the mobile application should be set to.
crus.title: Mobile application - Profile page
crus.acceptance_criteria: In order for a user to have a profile page on the mobile application.

crus.action: Given that a user is logged in to the mobile application, then the first page that is shown should be the search page.
crus.title: Mobile application - Search
crus.acceptance_criteria: In order for a user to search for a restaurant.

crus.action: The user should be able to search for a restaurant, according to several search options.
crus.title: Mobile application - Search
crus.acceptance_criteria: In order for a user to search for a restaurant.

crus.action: There should also be a free- text search option.
crus.title: Mobile application - Search
crus.acceptance_criteria: In order for a user to search for a restaurant.

crus.action: A user should be able to select multiple search options in one search.
crus.title: Mobile application - Search
crus.acceptance_criteria: In order for a user to search for a restaurant.

crus.action:  Search results can be viewed on a map.

crus.title: Mobile application - Search result in a list view

crus.acceptance_criteria: The way results should be displayed in a list.

crus.action: specific dish  When searching by a search option, other than price, the restaurants should be sorted according to the following order: 1.

crus.action: A user should be able to select a pin on a map or an element on a list.
crus.title: Mobile application - Navigation to restaurant
crus.acceptance_criteria: To navigate a user to a chosen restaurant.

crus.action: When a selection is made, the location of the restaurant should be sent to the mobile phone’s GPS-navigation program.
crus.title: Mobile application - Navigation to restaurant
crus.acceptance_criteria: To navigate a user to a chosen restaurant.

crus.action: The user should then be navigated to the destination.
crus.title: Mobile application - Navigation to restaurant
crus.acceptance_criteria: To navigate a user to a chosen restaurant.

crus.action: When the destination is reached, a user should be able to go back to the search page on the mobile application.
crus.title: Mobile application - Navigation to restaurant
crus.acceptance_criteria: To navigate a user to a chosen restaurant.

crus.action: The search feature should be prominent and easy to find for the user.
crus.title: Prominent search feature
crus.acceptance_criteria: In order to for a user to find the search feature easily.

crus.title: Hard drive space
crus.acceptance_criteria: PLAN: No more than 15 MB. WISH: No more than 10 MB

crus.title: Application memory usage
crus.acceptance_criteria: PLAN: No more than 16 MB WISH: No more than 10 MB

crus.action: The different search options should be evident, simple and easy to understand.
crus.title: Usage of the search feature
crus.acceptance_criteria: In order to for a user to perform a search easily.

crus.action: The application should be portable with iOS and Android.
crus.title: Application portability
crus.acceptance_criteria: The adaptable platform for the application to run on.

crus.action: Test environments should be built for the application to allow testing of the applications different functions.
crus.title: Application testability
crus.acceptance_criteria: In order to test the application.

crus.action: The application should be connected to the GPS device.
crus.title: GPS Connection
crus.acceptance_criteria: In order for the application to get the users location, the map and to calculate the distance.

crus.action: The results displayed in the list view should be user friendly and easy to understand.
crus.title: Usage of the result in the list view
crus.acceptance_criteria: In order to for a user to use the list view easily.

crus.action: Selecting an element in the result list should only take one click.
crus.title: Usage of the result in the list view
crus.acceptance_criteria: In order to for a user to use the list view easily.

crus.action: The results displayed in the map view should be user friendly and easy to understand.
crus.title: Usage of the result in the map view
crus.acceptance_criteria: In order to for a user to use the map view easily.

crus.action: Selecting a pin on the map should only take one click.
crus.title: Usage of the result in the map view
crus.acceptance_criteria: In order to for a user to use the map view easily.

crus.action: The information link should be prominent and it should be evident that it is a usable link.
crus.title: Usage of the information link
crus.acceptance_criteria: In order to for a user to use the information link easily.

crus.action: Selecting the information link should only take one click.
crus.title: Usage of the information link
crus.acceptance_criteria: In order to for a user to use the information link easily.

crus.constraint: No more than 2 seconds 100% of the time.
crus.title: Response Time
crus.acceptance_criteria: Measurements obtained from 1000 searches during testing.

crus.action: inform user about connection loss
crus.title: System dependability
crus.acceptance_criteria: 100% of the time, measurements obtained from 1000 hours of usage during testing

crus.action: inform user about strange input
crus.title: System dependability
crus.acceptance_criteria: 100% of the time, measurements obtained from 1000 hours of usage during testing

crus.action: The security of creating account for restaurant owners of the system.
crus.title: RestaurantOwnerCreateAccountSecurity
crus.acceptance_criteria: Scale: If a restaurant owner wants to create an account and the desired user name is occupied, the restaurant owner should be asked to choose a different user name.; Meter: Measurements obtained on 1000 hours of usage during testing.

crus.action: The reliability of the system.
crus.title: SystemReliability
crus.acceptance_criteria: Scale: The reliability that the system gives the right result on a search.; Meter: Measurements obtained from 1000 searches during testing.; Plan: More than 99% of the searches.
